name: database-cli
description: Read-only database investigation through local CLI and MCP commands.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only SQL via local CLI or MCP
interface.longDescription: Use Database CLI to inspect database schema, search metadata, run safe read-only SQL, compare records across environments, and produce human-reviewed repair SQL through local CLI or MCP commands.
defaultPrompt: Use Database CLI to inspect a database schema.
Use Database CLI to run a safe read-only SQL query.
